panel.onboarding.title: Welcome to Finance Dashboard
panel.onboarding.body: No bank accounts connected yet. Connect your account now or start demo mode.
wizard.title: Connect bank account
wizard.step.1.title: Select bank
wizard.step.2.title: Authorization
wizard.step.2.instruction: Authorize access at $bank. A new window was opened. Close it after confirmation.
wizard.step.2.timeout_label: $min:$sec remaining — if the bank page does not respond, cancel here
wizard.step.2.timeout_expired: Time limit reached. Please try again.
wizard.step.4.title: Connection successful
wizard.step.4.body: $count account(s) connected. Data is loading now.
header.refresh.rate_limited_title: Daily bank API limit reached (4/day per account). Next refresh available tomorrow.
header.refresh.button_title: Fetch live data from bank API
header.refresh.toast_rate_limited: Daily bank API limit reached. Cache remains active, new live data tomorrow from 00:00.
header.ts.loading: Refreshing… Bank API is being queried
